2604.08502.title: Quantifying Explanation Consistency: The C-Score Metric for CAM-Based Explainability in Medical Image Classification
2604.08502.paper_summary: Class Activation Mapping (CAM) methods are widely used to generate visual explanations for deep learning classifiers in medical imaging. However, existing evaluation frameworks assess whether explanations are correct, measured by localisation fidelity against radiologist annotations, rather than whether they are consistent: whether the model applies the same spatial reasoning strategy across different patients with the same pathology. We propose the C-Score (Consistency Score), a confidence-weighted, annotation-free metric that quantifies intra-class explanation reproducibility via intensity-emphasised pairwise soft IoU across correctly classified instances. We evaluate six CAM techniques: GradCAM, GradCAM++, LayerCAM, EigenCAM, ScoreCAM, and MS GradCAM++ across three CNN architectures (DenseNet201, InceptionV3, ResNet50V2) over thirty training epochs on the Kermany chest X-ray dataset, covering transfer learning and fine-tuning phases. We identify three distinct mechanisms of AUC-consistency dissociation, invisible to standard classification metrics: threshold-mediated gold list collapse, technique-specific attribution collapse at peak AUC, and class-level consistency masking in global aggregation. C-Score provides an early warning signal of impending model instability. ScoreCAM deterioration on ResNet50V2 is detectable one full checkpoint before catastrophic AUC collapse and yields architecture-specific clinical deployment recommendations grounded in explanation quality rather than predictive ranking alone.
2604.08502.paper_summary_zh: 類別激活映射（CAM）方法被廣泛用於生成醫學影像中深度學習分類器的視覺解釋。<lb/>然而，現有的評估框架評估解釋是否正確，通過與放射科醫生註釋的定位忠實度來衡量，而不是評估它們是否一致：即模型是否在具有相同病理的不同患者之間應用相同的空間推理策略。<lb/>我們提出了C-Score（一致性分數），這是一種基於信心加權的無註釋指標，通過強調強度的成對軟IoU量化類內解釋的可重複性，針對正確分類的實例。<lb/>我們在Kermany胸部X光數據集上評估六種CAM技術：GradCAM、GradCAM++、LayerCAM、EigenCAM、ScoreCAM和MS GradCAM++，涵蓋三種CNN架構（DenseNet201、InceptionV3、ResNet50V2），並在三十個訓練週期內進行轉移學習和微調階段的評估。<lb/>我們識別出三種AUC一致性解離的不同機制，這些機制對標準分類指標來說是不可見的：閾值介導的金名單崩潰、在峰值AUC時的技術特定歸因崩潰，以及在全局聚合中的類別級一致性掩蔽。<lb/>C-Score提供了即將發生的模型不穩定性的早期警告信號。<lb/>在ResNet50V2上，ScoreCAM的惡化在災難性AUC崩潰之前可以檢測到一個完整的檢查點，並基於解釋質量而非僅僅是預測排名，提供架構特定的臨床部署建議。
2604.08502.author: Kabilan Elangovan et.al.
